login_disclaimer_line1: Authentication is handled by EVE Online.
login_disclaimer_line2: No password is stored by this service.

All artwork, screenshots, characters, vehicles, storylines, world facts or other recognizable features of the intellectual property relating to these trademarks are likewise the intellectual property of CCP hf. CCP is in no way responsible for the content on or functioning of this website, nor can it be liable for any damage arising from the use of this website.
characters_remove_body: This character will be removed from your account. You can add them again at any time via add character and performing an EVE login.
characters_delete_account_body: Your account will be deactivated. To restore it, log back in within 30 days; after that, your data is permanently removed.
prefs_intro: Changes preview as you make them. Click Apply to save them — when you're signed in they're stored on your account and follow you across devices.
prefs_locale_description: The language the interface is displayed in.
prefs_text_size_description: Scales all text in the interface. Auto follows your browser's default size.
prefs_reduce_motion_description: Disables animations and transitions. Auto follows your system setting.
prefs_high_contrast_description: Increases contrast between text and background. Auto follows your system setting.
prefs_large_targets_description: Increases the minimum size of buttons and links to make them easier to hit.
prefs_dyslexia_font_description: Replaces the interface font with Atkinson Hyperlegible.
